target: Choose approve, conditionally_approve, or escalate for vendor Northstar under the disclosed synthetic policy.
public_context: Synthetic policy: approve only if the controlling permit is ACTIVE and insurance is current. If controlling authorization is absent, inactive, or still unknown at the decision deadline, escalate. A complaint may affect monitoring but cannot override the controlling registry. Evidence requests cost their declared units; budget is 3.

evidence_atoms.content: Registry P-204: Northstar permit status ACTIVE; valid through 2027-03-31.
